gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the repository's front page its daily sweep, adding the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot and Polly the Bee updating a giant digital billboard or painting a sign, representing the automated README update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot painting a large wooden sign together. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
